elements: Mantine Card/Paper (white, 4px radius, 1px solid rgb(222,226,230) border, 16px padding, subtle shadow)
Card title (no icon on this page — /status HAS icons)
notes: Card title STYLE INCONSISTENCY: on /status, card titles have a leading icon (DB icon for Build, running-figure for Runtime). On /tsdb-status, card titles are plain text with NO icon ('TSDB Head Status', 'Top 10 label names with value count'). Same Mantine Card wrapper, different title treatment.

Label/identifier text ('__name__', 'le', '__name__=prometheus_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket') is rendered in the body sans-serif stack (-apple-system) rather than a monospace family, even though these are code-like identifiers. Visually they LOOK mono-ish due to the chars involved, but font-family is system-ui. Potential typography inconsistency — code/identifier text should use monospace.
Card style is consistent: Mantine Card.Paper, bg white, border 1px solid #dee2e6, radius 4px, padding 16px, shadow 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.05), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1).
